title: aws-kms: 4096-byte message limit for MessageType::Raw is undocumented
description: AwsKmsBackend::sign uses MessageType::Raw (lib:145), which causes KMS to hash the message internally. KMS limits Raw messages to 4096 bytes. A message >4096 bytes returns an opaque AWS SDK error — callers get SecretError::Backend with no guidance. This will generate a repeating class of user bug reports: 'works for small messages, fails for large messages, no useful error'. Document the limit or pre-hash and use MessageType::Digest.
